zh.La Sarraz, Vaud, Switzerland: 瑞士瓦特拉 薩拉茲
zh.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de Grandson是Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson和Jordane de la Sarraz的兒子，於大約1154年出生在瑞士瓦特格藍德森。他於大約1178年與Beatrix Genève在瑞士波格結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1235年1月26日在瑞士波勒 瓦特享年82歲，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯o喬。

zh-hans.La Sarraz, Vaud, Switzerland: 瑞士瓦特拉 薩拉茲
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de Grandson是Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson和Jordane de la Sarraz的儿子，于大约1154年出生在瑞士瓦特格藍德森。他于大约1178年与Beatrix Genève在瑞士波格结婚。他们至少是13个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1235年1月26日在瑞士波勒 瓦特享年82岁，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯o喬。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grandson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): said to be a habitational name from Granson on Lake Neuchâtel (Switzerland).

History: The first known bearer of this surname is Rigaldus de Grancione (flourished 1040). The name was taken to Britain by Otes de Grandison (died 1328) and his brother. They were among a group of Savoyards who settled in England when Henry III married a granddaughter of the Count of Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: Ebles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Ellis , or, alternatively, a variant of Ell , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In Devon the name may also be a variant of Heales, with loss of initial H-, itself a variant of Heal or Heel, with post-medieval excrescent -s, or a variant of Hales .

variants.name: Ellis
meanings: From a medieval vernacular form of   Elias  , in use as a given name in northern England from the 14th century onwards. In modern use it is often a transferred use of the surname derived from this name. In Wales it is now often taken as an Anglicized form of the Old Welsh name Elisud . It has enjoyed considerable popularity in recent times, having also been taken up as a girl's name.

variants.name: Eells
meanings: English (Durham and North Yorkshire): variant of   Eales  .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de Grandson was born about 1154, in Grandson, Vaud, Switzerland as the son of Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson and Jordane de la Sarraz. He married Beatrix Genève about 1178, in Neuchâtel, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 26 January 1235, in Le Vaud, Bern, Switzerland, at the age of 82, and was buried in Joux, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de Grandson est né environ 1154, à Grandson, Vaud, Suisse, fils d’Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson et Jordane de la Sarraz. Il a épousé Beatrix Genève environ 1178, à Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 13 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 janvier 1235, à Le Vaud, Berne, Suisse, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Joux, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de Grandson wurde um 1154 in Grandson, Waadt, Schweiz, als Sohn von Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson und Jordane de la Sarraz geboren. Er hat um 1178 in Neuenburg, Schweiz Beatrix Genève geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 13 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Januar 1235 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Le Vaud, Bern, Schweiz und wurde in Joux, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de Grandson è nato il circa 1154 nel Grandson, Vaud, Svizzera come figlio di Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson e Jordane de la Sarraz. Lui sposato Beatrix Genève circa 1178, nel Neuchâtel, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 13 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 gennaio 1235, nel Le Vaud, Berna, Svizzera, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Joux, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de Grandsonは約1154年にスイスヴァウドグランドソンでEbal de Grandson Seigneur de GrandsonとJordane de la Sarrazの息子として生まれた。約1178年にスイスネウエンブルグでBeatrix Genèveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1235年1月26日にスイスバーンル ヴァウドで82歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスルhoンジョウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de Grandson(은)는 대략 1154년 스위스 바드 그랜드슨에서 Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson(와)과 Jordane de la Sarraz의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1178년 스위스 니우버그에서 Beatrix Genève(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1235년 1월 26일 스위스 버 일 바드에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 ho니 조우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de Grandson nasceu aproximadamente 1154, em Grandson, Vaud, Suiça filho de Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson e Jordane de la Sarraz. Ele casou-se com Beatrix Genève aproximadamente 1178, em Neuenburg, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 13 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1235, em Le Vaud, Bern, Suiça, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Joux, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de Grandson родился около 1154 г. в местности грандсон, вауд, Швейцария. Его родителей звали Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson и Jordane de la Sarraz. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix Genève около 1178 г. в местности неуенбург, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 января 1235 г. в местности л вауд, бирн, Швейцария в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности джоукс, рoн, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

sm.from 1158 to 1159: mai le 1158 e o'o I le 1159

es.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de Grandson nació aproximadamente 1154, en Grandson, Vaud, Suiza como hijo de Ebal de Grandson Seigneur de Grandson y Jordane de la Sarraz. Se casó con Beatrix Genève aproximadamente 1178, en Neuenburg, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 13 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de enero de 1235, en Le Vaud, Bern, Suiza, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Joux, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
